pages.text:
PROCÈS VERBAL

OF THE DEPOSIT OF THE RATIFICATION BY FRANOE OF THE TREATY

TOR THE RENUNCIATION OF MAR, SIGNED AT PARIS ON AUGUST 37,

1988.

In conformity with Article III of the treaty for the renunciation of war conoluded at Paris on August 27, 1938, the French Ambassador at Washington called this day at the

Department of State at Hashington to proceed with the deposit with the Government of the United States of America of the instrument of ratification of the said treaty by the Government of the French Republic.

The instrument of ratification, having been found upon examination to be in due foim, was entrusted to the

Government

. of the United States of America to be deposit-

ed in the archives

of the Department of State of that

Government.

In witness whereof, the undersigned have signed this procès verbal and affixed thereto their seals.

Hashington, April 22, 1929.

Plan

Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary

of the French Republic.

Merry 1 Stireso

Secretary of State of the

United States of America.
